runs.question: Governance Physics Framework - audit the theoretical foundations, scaling laws, and empirical validity
runs.result: AUDited: Dunbar validated, scaling plausible, G unfalsifiable
rejected: Cross-domain comparability (Fed, K8s, Corp are different phenomena)
next_tests: G range narrowing in homogeneous systems (Test 3)
Failed system analysis for survivor bias (Test 4)

open_questions: What is the maximum viable organization size?
Do failed systems show different G distributions?
key_insights: Framework is useful metaphor, not predictive science
